Dear sir,

Sorry for my English is not well.

I met the problem when install openwebmail (/usr/ports/mail/openwebmail).

The port /usr/ports/net-mgmt/p5-NetAddr-IP can not done the compile work, thus suspend and stop. I had try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes to install it but still fail.

Redeye.
